changes: OpenClaw shipped v2026.4.14-beta.1 on 2026-04-14 02:07 UTC, immediately after the new stable v2026.4.12 on 2026-04-13.
Hermes Agent moved again with v2026.4.13 on 2026-04-13 18:52 UTC.
AstrBot followed its fresh stable with patch release v4.23.1 on 2026-04-13 15:42 UTC.
SwarmClaw kept shipping rapid follow-ups, reaching v1.5.44 on 2026-04-13 12:10 UTC.
PicoClaw posted another nightly build on 2026-04-14 03:18 UTC, while stable remains v0.2.6.
whyItMatters: OpenClaw is still setting category pace, and the quick beta-after-stable pattern suggests active shipping pressure on the core reference product.
Hermes moving matters because the strongest learning-loop adjacent benchmark is still shipping, not stalling.
AstrBot and SwarmClaw both releasing again reinforces that the IM-native and orchestration layers around this category remain very live.
PicoClaw continuing nightly updates keeps the low-resource edge lane credible even without a new stable cut.
Net: this was another material day-level update, but it still does not change the stable strategic thesis yet.
